RequestBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

ResponseBody.name: MyAgent
ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd, os, matplotlib.pyplot as plt, seaborn as sns, numpy as np
path="/mnt/data/assistant-HCUFrS5nsHy3HeF8sxEEYs-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv"
df=pd.read_csv(path)
df.head(), df.columns, df.shape

import matplotlib
matplotlib.rcParams['figure.dpi']=200
plt.figure(figsize=(9,4.8))
sns.barplot(data=trans, x='operating_profit_num', y='name', color='#2a6fbb')
plt.title('Transportation Sector - Operating Profit')
plt.xlabel('Operating Profit')
plt.ylabel('')
for i,(v) in enumerate(trans['operating_profit_num']):
    plt.text(v+5, i, f'{v:.1f}', va='center', fontsize=9)
plt.tight_layout()
out_png="/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png"
plt.savefig(out_png, bbox_inches='tight')
out_png, os.path.getsize(out_png)

content.text:
Created the bar chart for **TRANSPORTATION sector – Operating Profit** from your uploaded CSV.

Download the file here: [transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png)
